---
page-layout: full
body-classes: home-page
---

::: {.home-hero}
![](images/banner.jpg){.hero-image}
:::

::: {.home-split}
::: {.home-left}
![](images/profile.jpg){.profile-photo}


:::

::: {.home-right}
<h2 class="name-row">
  <span class="name-text">Salvatore Viola</span>
  <span class="social-links">
    <a href="mailto:sviola@ub.edu" aria-label="Email"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></a>
    <a href="https://github.com/salvatoreviola" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/salvatore-viola-03078a1b8/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
  </span>
</h2>


I am a third-year PhD Student in Economics at the **Universitat de Barcelona** ([UB](https://www.ub.edu/school-economics/)) affiliated with the **Quantitative Regional Analysis Group** ([AQR-IREA](https://www.ub.edu/aqr/)). My PhD thesis is supervised jointly by [Rosina Moreno](https://rosinamorenoserrano.wordpress.com/) and [Ernest Miguelez](https://www.ernestmiguelez.com/). 

My research interests include the geography of innovation and the economics of science. I am particularly interested in environmental-related science and innovation as well as how migration contributes to the global diffusion of knowledge. 
:::
:::
